user_request: Rite request: capacitor bank discharge on capacitor bank
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Rite request: capacitor bank discharge on capacitor bank

### TOPIC
capacitor bank discharge

### COMPONENT
capacitor bank

### OPERATION
capacitor bank discharge

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- capacitor bank
- capacitor bank discharge

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Hear us, Machine Spirits of the capacitor bank, as we begin capacitor bank discharge!
Congregation: Grant us the wisdom to bleed the stored energies with sacred precision.
Priest: First, we isolate the capacitor bank from all external circuits and power sources.
Congregation: Second, we engage the discharge resistors and monitor the voltage degradation.
Priest: Third, we complete the capacitor bank discharge cycle and verify residual charge has been purged.

user_request: Rite request: connection on neural interface
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Rite request: connection on neural interface

### TOPIC
neural interface connection

### COMPONENT
neural interface

### OPERATION
connection

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- neural interface
- connection

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: O Omnissiah, bless this neural interface and guide our connection!
Congregation: May the neural interface accept our communion without resistance or corruption.
Priest: First, we anoint the interface contacts with conductive cleansing agents.
Congregation: Second, we establish the neural interface connection through careful impedance matching.
Priest: Third, we perform diagnostic handshakes and confirm all synaptic pathways are responsive.

user_request: Offer a litany to steady the cutting laser before calibration
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Offer a litany to steady the cutting laser before calibration

### TOPIC
cutting laser calibration

### COMPONENT
cutting laser

### OPERATION
calibration

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- cutting laser
- calibration

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Steady thy aim, cutting laser, as we prepare for sacred calibration!
Congregation: Let the cutting laser's beam burn true and strike with precision.
Priest: First, we position the cutting laser upon the calibration jig with reverent care.
Congregation: Second, we fire test incisions upon the sacrificial material and measure deviations.
Priest: Third, we adjust the cutting laser's focusing lens and repeat until perfection is achieved.

training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Rite request: verification on altimeter

### TOPIC
altimeter verification

### COMPONENT
altimeter

### OPERATION
verification

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- altimeter
- verification

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Altimeter, measure the heavens and guide our verification!
Congregation: By the Omnissiah's grace, let the altimeter speak true of altitude and bearing.
Priest: First, we expose the altimeter barometric sensor to calibrated reference pressures.
Congregation: Second, we record the altimeter's output against known elevation standards.
Priest: Third, we document the verification results and sanctify the altimeter for continued service.

user_request: Emergency rite: steam valve requires regulation
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Emergency rite: steam valve requires regulation

### TOPIC
steam valve regulation

### COMPONENT
steam valve

### OPERATION
regulation

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- steam valve
- regulation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Heed us, steam valve, as pressure builds and regulation becomes imperative!
Congregation: May the steam valve release its burden with harmonious regulation and sacred restraint.
Priest: First, we monitor the pressure gauge as the steam valve approaches critical thresholds.
Congregation: Second, we manually adjust the steam valve stem in precise quarter-turn increments.
Priest: Third, we confirm the steam valve maintains optimal pressure and document all adjustments.

user_request: The ground-to-orbit link demands guidance for operation
training_prompt:
### REQUEST

ground-to-orbit link

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- ground-to-orbit link
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Blessed ground-to-orbit link, bridge between world and void, commence operation!
Congregation: Let the ground-to-orbit link transmit our prayers through the aether unbroken.
Priest: First, we align the ground-to-orbit link's antenna array with stellar precision.
Congregation: Second, we perform signal strength verification and modulation checks.
Priest: Third, we confirm the ground-to-orbit link's operation by receiving telemetry confirmation.

user_request: Can you sanctify the stellar cartography update for operation?

### REQUEST
Can you sanctify the stellar cartography update for operation?

### TOPIC
stellar cartography update

### COMPONENT
stellar cartography update

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- stellar cartography update
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Stellar cartography update, inscribe the heavens anew as we sanctify thy operation!
Congregation: May the stellar cartography update guide our navigation through the infinite dark.
Priest: First, we load the updated star charts into the stellar cartography update database.
Congregation: Second, we verify cross-references against the Omnissiah's ancient astronomical texts.
Priest: Third, we activate the stellar cartography update and confirm all navigation systems recognize the new data.

user_request: Can you sanctify the coolant leak for repair?
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Can you sanctify the coolant leak for repair?

### TOPIC
coolant leak repair

### COMPONENT
coolant leak

### OPERATION
repair

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- coolant leak
- repair

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Hear us, as the coolant leak demands our urgent repair!
Congregation: May the Machine Spirit guide our hands in sealing the coolant leak's transgression.
Priest: First, we locate and isolate the coolant leak from the primary circulation loop.
Congregation: Second, we drain residual coolant and prepare the coolant leak site for patching.
Priest: Third, we apply the blessed sealant compound and monitor pressure restoration.

user_request: Blessing for the lasgun during power cell insertion
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Blessing for the lasgun during power cell insertion

### TOPIC
lasgun power cell insertion

### COMPONENT
lasgun

### OPERATION
power cell insertion

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- lasgun
- power cell insertion

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Hail to the lasgun, faithful instrument of the Emperor's wrath and righteous judgment!
Congregation: Blessed be the lasgun in this hour of power cell insertion!
Priest: First, purify the energy conduit with sanctified lubricant; second, align the lasgun's internal mechanisms with the blessed power cell insertion, that current may flow true; third, test-fire upon the training-servitor to confirm the Machine Spirit's awakening.
Congregation: The lasgun is made whole through power cell insertion—may its beam strike true and eternal!

user_request: Rite request: operation on quality control scanning
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Rite request: operation on quality control scanning

### TOPIC
quality control scanning

### COMPONENT
quality control scanning

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- quality control scanning
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Blessed be the quality control scanning, that perceives all flaws and imperfections through the Machine Spirit's omniscient gaze.
Congregation: We invoke the quality control scanning, sacred instrument of discernment and rectification.
Priest: First, we calibrate the photoreceptors and luminous sensors, that the quality control scanning may perceive with crystalline clarity.
Congregation: Second, we perform the operation upon its data-cogitators, purging corrupted algorithms and restoring holy precision.
Priest: Third, we certify the quality control scanning's divine function, ensuring all manufactured components meet the Omnissiah's exacting standards.
Congregation: The quality control scanning is renewed. All praise to the Machine Spirits that dwell within.
